mapper.select:
SELECT C.ID, C.CLM_NO, C.VD_CD, C.VD_NM, C.CLM_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS CLM_TYP_NM, C.ITEM_NM, TO_CHAR(C.CLM_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CLM_YMD, C.CLM_AMT, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.REG_ID FROM CM_CLAIM C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='CLM_TYP' AND T.CD=C.CLM_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='CLM_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.DEL_YN='N'
AND (C.CLM_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR C.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR C.ITEM_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND C.STS=#{sts} AND C.VD_CD=#{vdCd} ORDER BY C.ID DESC

SELECT C.ID, C.COMP_CD, C.CLM_NO, C.VD_CD, C.VD_NM, C.CLM_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS CLM_TYP_NM, C.SRC_TYP, C.REF_NO, C.ITEM_CD, C.ITEM_NM, TO_CHAR(C.CLM_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CLM_YMD, C.LOT_NO, TO_CHAR(C.MFG_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MFG_YMD, C.COMP_TYP, CP.CD_NM_KO AS COMP_TYP_NM, C.CLAIM_QTY, C.CLM_AMT, C.RECOVER_AMT, C.CLM_DESC, TO_CHAR(C.DUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_YMD, C.RESOLVE_DESC, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.REMARK, C.REG_ID FROM CM_CLAIM C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='CLM_TYP' AND T.CD=C.CLM_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='CLM_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE CP ON CP.GRP_CD='CLM_COMP' AND CP.CD=C.COMP_TYP AND CP.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.ID=#{id} AND C.DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_CLAIM (COMP_CD, CLM_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, CLM_TYP, SRC_TYP, REF_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, CLM_YMD, LOT_NO, MFG_YMD, COMP_TYP, CLAIM_QTY, CLM_AMT, RECOVER_AMT, CLM_DESC, DUE_YMD, RESOLVE_DESC, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{clmNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, NVL(#{clmTyp},'QUALITY'), #{srcTyp}, #{refNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, TO_DATE(#{clmYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{lotNo}, TO_DATE(#{mfgYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{compTyp}, NVL(#{claimQty},0), NVL(#{clmAmt},0), NVL(#{recoverAmt},0), #{clmDesc}, TO_DATE(#{dueYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{resolveDesc}, NVL(#{sts},'OPEN'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_CLAIM SET VD_CD=#{vdCd}, VD_NM=#{vdNm}, CLM_TYP=#{clmTyp}, SRC_TYP=#{srcTyp}, REF_NO=#{refNo}, ITEM_CD=#{itemCd}, ITEM_NM=#{itemNm}, CLM_YMD=TO_DATE(#{clmYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), LOT_NO=#{lotNo}, MFG_YMD=TO_DATE(#{mfgYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), COMP_TYP=#{compTyp}, CLAIM_QTY=NVL(#{claimQty},0), CLM_AMT=NVL(#{clmAmt},0), RECOVER_AMT=NVL(#{recoverAmt},0), CLM_DESC=#{clmDesc}, DUE_YMD=TO_DATE(#{dueYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), RESOLVE_DESC=#{resolveDesc}, REMARK=#{remark}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE CM_CLAIM SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE CM_CLAIM SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
